---
name: 🐛 Bug Report | Bug 报告
about: Create a report to help us improve | 创建报告帮助我们改进
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''

---

## 🐛 Bug Description | Bug 描述

**English:** A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

**中文：** 清晰简洁地描述这个 bug 是什么。

<!-- Describe the bug here | 在此描述 bug -->

---

## 🔄 To Reproduce | 重现步骤

**English:** Steps to reproduce the behavior:

**中文：** 重现该行为的步骤：

1. Go to '...' | 前往 '...'
2. Click on '....' | 点击 '....'
3. Scroll down to '....' | 滚动到 '....'
4. See error | 看到错误

---

## ✅ Expected Behavior | 预期行为

**English:** A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

**中文：** 清晰简洁地描述您期望发生的情况。

<!-- Describe expected behavior | 在此描述预期行为 -->

---

## 📸 Screenshots | 截图

**English:** If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem.

**中文：** 如果适用，请添加截图以帮助解释您的问题。

<!-- Add screenshots here | 在此添加截图 -->

---

## 🖥️ Environment | 环境

**English:** Please complete the following information:

**中文：** 请完成以下信息：

- **OS | 操作系统**: [e.g. macOS, Linux, Windows]
- **Python Version | Python 版本**: [e.g. 3.10, 3.11]
- **DailyClaw Version | DailyClaw 版本**: [e.g. 0.1.0]
- **OpenClaw Version | OpenClaw 版本**: [e.g. latest]
- **Browser | 浏览器** (if applicable): [e.g. chrome, safari]

---

## 📋 Logs | 日志

**English:** If applicable, add logs to help explain your problem.

**中文：** 如果适用，请添加日志以帮助解释您的问题。

```bash
# Paste relevant logs here | 在此粘贴相关日志
```

---

## 🎯 Additional Context | 其他上下文

**English:** Add any other context about the problem here.

**中文：** 在此添加关于问题的任何其他上下文。

<!-- Add additional context | 在此添加其他上下文 -->

---

## 🐱 Which Cat is Related? | 相关猫咪

**English:** If you know which agent/cat module this relates to, please check:

**中文：** 如果您知道这与哪个代理/猫咪模块相关，请勾选：

- [ ] 🍊 Zeus (Coordination | 协调)
- [ ] 🎀 Athena (Architecture | 架构)
- [ ] 🐯 Hephaestus (Implementation | 实现)
- [ ] 🔵 Apollo (Testing | 测试)
- [ ] 🧶 Hermes (Integration | 集成)
- [ ] ⚫ Artemis (Security | 安全)
- [ ] 🤖 General (General | 通用)

---

## ✅ Checklist | 检查清单

**English:** Before submitting, please confirm:

**中文：** 提交前，请确认：

- [ ] I have searched existing issues and this bug has not been reported | 我已搜索现有 issue，此 bug 未被报告
- [ ] I have provided a clear description and reproduction steps | 我已提供清晰的描述和重现步骤
- [ ] I have included relevant environment information | 我已包含相关的环境信息
- [ ] This is a DailyClaw-specific bug (not an upstream issue) | 这是 DailyClaw 特定的 bug（不是上游问题）

---

<div align="center">

**Thank you for helping improve DailyClaw! | 感谢您帮助改进 DailyClaw！** 🐱

</div>
